_comment: FC-2901V hardware interface config. Edit driver/channels to match your wiring.

_pinout_15pin_D.pin_5: 0-5 V setpoint input  (0 V = 0 sccm, 5 V = full scale)
_pinout_15pin_D.pin_9: 0-5 V flow output     (read by DAQ AI channel)
_pinout_15pin_D.pin_14: TTL valve-OFF          (low = valve closed, high = normal control)
